mapper.select: SELECT id, category, name, description, price, image, available, display_order, updated_at FROM cafe_menus ORDER BY category, display_order, id
SELECT id, category, name, description, price, image, available, display_order, updated_at FROM cafe_menus WHERE available = TRUE ORDER BY category, display_order, id
SELECT id, category, name, description, price, image, available, display_order, updated_at FROM cafe_menus WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE cafe_menus SET name = #{name}, price = #{price}, available = #{available}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() WHERE id = #{id}
